name: Jae-Hyeon Pyeon

biography: Jae-Hyeon Pyeon received a B.S. degree in the school of electrical engineering at Hanyang University, Ansan, South Korea. His research interests include analog and digital circuit designs of phase-locked-loop (PLL).
